title: ASICS Women's Gel-Nimbus 18 Running Shoe
description:
After 18 years of innovation, the Nimbus® series continues as one of the most recognized high performing footwear by ASICS. The new gel® placement offers modernized geometry of cushioning, designed to improve adaptability and mitigate brisk impacts. Improved guidance line® technology harmoniously syncs componentry to embrace the motions of the runner gait cycle.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
FluidRide: FluidRide  provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement on multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidFit:  ASICS FluidFit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.
Heel Clutching System: Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.
Seamless construction

reviews.title: COMFORT
reviews.text: I LOVE THIS SHOE DUE TO THE FACT I HAD HARDWARE INSTALLED INTO MY RIGHT FOOT BECAUSE MY TOES HAVE COLLAPSED FROM RHEUMATOID ARTHRITIS .... THE ORTHOPEADIC DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND ( RUNNING SHOE) SINCE I WORK ON CONCRETE FLOORS ..... THIS SHOE HELPS A GREAT DEAL FOR ME AND I HOPE IT HELPS SOMEONE ELSE GOING THROUGH THE SAME THING .... ALL THESE DIFFERENT KINDS OF GYM SHOES I BOUGHT AND NOTHING WORKS TIL THE DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND OF SHOE. I'M NOT GETTING PAID TO SAY THIS, BUT I WILL SAY, IF YOU WERE IN MY POSITION TRYING TO FIND COMFORT AFTER SPENDING $$$$ FOR SEVERAL DIFFERENT TYPES OF GYM SHOES AND SOMEONE RECOMMEND A CERTAIN BRAND COMPARED TO ALL THE $$$$ YOU SPENT PRIOR .... I WISH I COULD GET MY MONEY BACK ON EVERY F*****  SINGLE (18) PAIR OF SHOES I PURCHASED ... FROM NOW ON THIS IS MY ONLY GYM SHOE I'LL WEAR FOR NOW ON.... LOVE THE COMFORT, WIDTH, AND I'M ABLE TO WALK MORE THAN 1 MILE WITHOUT HAVING TO STOP BECAUSE MY FEET ARE HURTING DUE TO THE CHRONIC  (RA) CONDITION LIFE THROWN AT ME.  LOVE LOVE LOVE THESE SHOES

title: 26.2 Marathon Girl Womens Vinyl Sticker Decal Jogging Running Shoes Run Choose Size & Color (V29) (6.25" X 3.75", Blue)
description: This vinyl decal is made of high quality indoor/outdoor rated and proven Oracal 651 vinyl!! -These are perfect for car windows, skateboards, Ipads, etc. (Practically any smooth, clean surface) -A vinyl cut sticker means that there is no background or clear backing. Only the image is the adhesive part! -These are not Cling-ons. -Please apply only to a clean, dry surface. Below are some instructions on how to apply these cool stickers: Step 1 Rub the sticker with a credit card or something with a rigid surface to be sure the transfer tape is properly adhered to the sticker. Step 2 Clean and dry the desired area. Stickers will stick best to clean smooth surfaces. Step 3 Remove the paper backing slowly making sure the sticker stays adhered to the transparent transfer tape Step 4 Carefully position the sticker to the desired area. Once the sticker sticks it will be nearly impossible to reposition without destroying the sticker. Rub the sticker from one side to the other, eliminating any air bubbles. Step 5 Use a hard edged object like a credit card to make sure the entire sticker is fully adhered to the surface. Step 6 Slowly remove the transfer tape. Making sure no part of the sticker remains on the transfer tape. Step 7 Check for air bubbles. In most cases air bubbles can be worked to the edge of the sticker, but if not, a pin hole will allow the air out and become virtually invisible, once the bubble is gone. That’s it! Your sticker is now worry free. It will last through rain, sleet, snow and gentle washing's. You can remove the sticker from glass surfaces with a razor blade or in most cases a fingernail will get the removal process started.
features: 26.2 Marathon Girl Womens Vinyl Sticker Decal

reviews.title: Comfortable, sturdy and a great value.
reviews.text:
First things First. I received this as a review item in exchange for an unbiased review. I have an 11 M foot (US) and while I wasn't overly crazy about the color, I realized they matched a lot of my race wear. So I decided to give them a try. The first run was a little tough but that's always the case (If you're new to running, trust me, don't run your first race without adequately breaking in your shoes). After about 15 miles I started to really like them.

So, you see the colors. I personally always buy the clip on laces which I did butI've probably got well over 60 miles on them now and while I'm pretty loyal to another brand (which is also costs substantially more) I will definitely be picking up another pair.

If you are a heel striker (work on your form before you suffer the consequences of it) these have ample cusioning in the back - but take a friendly word of advice, instead of getting into bad form. These are great shoes to improve your form with and once you have it, the extra padding in the back is not impediment. They are very light and fit well once worn in. I'm not trilled about the simultaneously yet cool look they have but so is life. You don't buy running shoes to look cool unless you're a poster you buy them for performance and these deliver.

Again I'm speaking to new runners and people that aren't that familiar with the sport. You don't want to have one pair you wear every day. They'll develop a wear pattern and it's not good. Instead buy at least two, ideally a few and alternate so that this happens at a much slower pace. From my experience, three pairs of shoes worn on alternating days will last much longer than one pair bought three times. And this is important b/c unless you're working on bearfoot running (which seems to still be a raging philosophical battle in the podiatric communities) you'll want support, comfort and stability. As a digression, I've tried barefoot running and it fundamentally changed the way I ran, until I stepped on a piece of glass and my right foot had yet to harden.

Again at the risk of lecturing remember that injuries are one of the biggest enemies to progress. You could easily run through broken glass on these and probably right over some smaller nails (I'm not advising it, just pointing it out). Styling aside I love these and will be picking up another pair or two in the near future.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 7 Running Shoes
description: Take on the toughest terrain in confidence with the men's GEL-VENTURE 7 performance trail running shoe by ASICS. Featuring GEL technology and an EVA midsole, this shoe is made for athletes who love to run in the great outdoors. GEL technology in the rearfoot area of the shoe provides shock absorption where you need it most, while the ORTHOLITE sockliner provides an additional layer of cushioning underfoot. It even molds to the shape of your feet, making each run even more comfortable than the last. Extra support comes from the sturdy upper crafted from synthetic leather, while the internal heel counter gently helps your foot remain in its natural line of motion, making for a more efficient stride. Meanwhile the EVA midsole protects your feet against impact and increases rebound, giving you an energetic feeling as you clock up the miles. Durable and practical, the GEL-VENTURE 7 shoe makes an excellent training partner whether you're new to trail running or a seasoned pro.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh

Ethylene Vinyl Acetate sole

Ortholite X-40 Sockliner: This premium sockliner features higher rebound properties while providing excellent moisture management and a high-level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC.)
Rearfoot GEL technology cushioning system: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.

Ortholite X-40 Sockliner: This premium sockliner features higher rebound properties while providing excellent moisture management and a high-level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC.)
Rearfoot GEL technology cushioning system: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.
Trail Specific Outsole: Reversed lugs provide uphill and downhill traction on all types of terrain.

Cushioned Running Shoes: ABZORB midsole technology in this runner absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, and the rubber outsole provides strength and durability
Built-In Off-Road Technology: Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris, while AT Tread on the outsole provides versatile traction during both on- and off-road activities
Plush, Cushioned Running Shoes: These runners feature lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsoles to provide lightweight cushioning and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts
Built to Last: With an all-over durable construction and an aggressive lugged outsole, these trail running shoes are designed to stand up to all of your outdoor activities
Athletic Aesthetic: With synthetic and mesh uppers that deliver breathability and a top-quality fit, these running shoes also boast a stylish look to fit in with your active lifestyle

reviews.title: Great for trail hiking
reviews.text:
These are great! This is the second pair of owned, just a different color style this time.
I did notice one is a bit more snug than the other, but that could just be my foot. Also I know they'll stretch out over time. The comfort and support are great, the treads are just right for our rocky environment in southeast Oregon.
I'm usually a 9.5 W in some brands. I bought these in a 10 regular, not wide width. The length and width are just right for me.

These also have great support for cardio workouts and walking/hiking long distances, especially on rough terrain.

The side stripes are actually tighter than the rest of the shoe so it felt like my foot was being compressed. I have narrow feet and don't have the problem generally so it was very surprising to me. The heel is definitely higher thN the toe. I could feel that I was standing at an angle. I usually love adidas so I was pretty disappointed.

title: Brooks Womens Glycerin 18 Running Shoe
description: A bit like running in the clouds. Thanks to the increased elasticity of the upper and the super-soft cushioning throughout the length, these men's running shoes are the ultimate comfort. Super soft cushioning. The revised ratio between midsole and outer sole allows you to increase LOFT DNA to achieve even more extreme softness at the sole of the foot, without losing reactivity or endurance. An OrthoLiteTM insole ensures an extraordinary wearing comfort.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin 18 is perfect for runners who think there's no such thing as too much cushioning. The upper enhances comfort by perfectly balancing stretch and structure.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides neutral support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Glycerin 17.

SUPER-SOFT CUSHIONING: Increased DNA LOFT super-soft cushioning allows for even more extreme softness, without losing responsiveness or durability, while the OrthoLite sockliner provides premium step-in comfort.
PLUSH FIT: The plush feel of an internal stretch bootie surrounds your foot and moves and expands with your stride. The engineered mesh upper enhances the fit.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: The plush transition zone makes every move from heel to toe feel incredibly soft and smooth.

reviews.title: Defective manufacturing
reviews.text: I’m this was my second pair of these shoes within 6 months but this pair is very u comfortable on the left shoe and I can’t do walks in them.  Very disappointed in it... it’s like the left shoe has a defect I it.  Unfortunately I saved the shoe for over a month before I wore it and too late to return.

reviews.title: Great support
reviews.text: These are very comfortable and supportive. I started wearing Brooks when I got planter fasciitis. I haven’t had issues in a long time. I tried another model, but I went back to these.

reviews.title: My Shoe!
reviews.text: These are the only shoes I have been wearing on a daily basis for over 10 years, Brooks Glycerin. My feet have seen many years of 12 hour shifts and are in sad shape. I have a dress pair, a pair I wear indoors, and several pairs for outdoors and yard work.  I can wear a man's 8 1/2 D or a Women's 9 1/2 wide and they fit perfectly.  If you need a cushioned shoe with good support these are the ones to buy.

title: Reebok Women's Ztaur Running Shoe
description: Reebok is an American-inspired global brand with a deep fitness heritage and a clear mission: To be the best fitness brand in the world. Not an easy one. But if there is one brand that can make it happen, it is Reebok, the brand that was fundamentally part of a fitness movement that forever changed the way we look at spandex and headbands. Sure, this is not the 1980s anymore – the world has moved on. But so has Reebok and it continues to be daring. Daring is knowing greatness doesn’t come from sameness. The past years have been characterized by a transformation from traditional sports to fitness. The three sides of the Reebok Delta, a symbol of change and transformation, represent the physical, mental and social changes that occur when individuals embrace the challenge of bettering themselves in the gym, in their lives and in the world.

reviews.text: excellent product.

reviews.title: Best in Class
reviews.text:
Adidas makes AMAZING running shoes. They're light as a feather and respond to your momentum. This pair also looks very stylish. I think it's a version of the shoe that many marathoners and Olympians wear. The knit makes them very breathable and easy to clean. They're also ideal if you like to run on vacation. They're easy to pack. Overall, I highly recommend these shoes.

Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided helps make your decision a little easier.

reviews.title: Crazy expensive for Made in Vietnam, but I like them.
reviews.text:
These shoes have a weight of 12oz each. Not super heavy, but not super lightweight either. Though you can see a thick white foam on the sole. . .The thickness of the bottom of the shoe is only about an 1/8 of an inch. If you’re running on a track or treadmill, that will probably not be an issue. But if you’re running on the road, I doubt the tread is going to last too long.

Padding on the inside is super-firm. Nice arch support. Nice firm padding around the heel / ankle.

Mesh breathable upper. The upper is all one piece, and the tongue is not separate. As you can from the pictures. . . .The laces are placed through plastic “shields” on each side of the shoe.

These shoes are Made in Vietnam. They are comfortable, and there is extra “bounce”, but I can’t say that they are worth the crazy expensive price. Nonetheless, I really like them.

reviews.title: So comfortable... like walking on air!
reviews.text:
The Adidas men’s Ultraboost 21’s are amaaaazing quality sneakers. My son wanted them, and I myself was not too sure about the pink on the bottom, however my teenager doesn’t mind the color at all. He actually loves the color combination.

The fit is perfect, true to size... and they are SO comfortable... almost like walking on air! You get that little bounce when you walk, and even more when running. They are well cushioned to keep your feet happy. They are a bit pricey, but you get what you pay for and these are worth it!

title: AUGSUN 20pcs 1/4inch Hard Steel Track and Cross Country Spikes with Spike Wrench, Replacement Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes…
features: 【Quality Material】: Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Very practical items for both men and women.
【Package Includes】: Package includes 20 pieces spikes with 1pcs spike wrench, convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.
【Size】: 6.35 mm (1/4 inch) in length, tapered and needle-shaped, which increases friction between the sole and the ground and prevents skidding.

【Easy to Use & Replace Spikes】: The package includes a spike wrench. It is very easy for you to screw the track spikes into the shoes, convenient to replace the spikes. Ideal for athletic tracks, field and cross country surfaces.

【Provide Great Drip for Sportsman】: The spike pins can increase the friction between the shoe sole and ground, resist skid and improve your running balance of traction, flexibility and speed for track sprints, long jump, running.
